name: proxlyte
description: Proxlyte is a free and open-source proxy server for Windows.
author: Mohamed Ramadan <m.ramadan181199@gmail.com>

scripts.release:beta: npm version prerelease --preid=beta -m "chore(release): %s" && git push origin main --tags
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch -m "chore(release): %s" && git push origin main --tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor -m "chore(release): %s" && git push origin main --tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major -m "chore(release): %s" && git push origin main --tags
